debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
bound2 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2
abs_int_le_int_abs : ∀ {t : ℝ}, 0 ≤ t → |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|

proof:
apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.abs
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1
failed_attempts:
apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · exact (g''_cont.intervalIntegral 0).abs.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · exact (g''_cont.abs.intervalIntegral 0).intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · intro t ht; exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]; fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.integral_interval_left (by fun_prop)
    · intro t ht; exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]; exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs.intervalIntegrable _ _
    · have hc : Continuous (fun s => |g'' s|) := g''_cont.abs
      have hd : Differentiable ℝ (fun t => ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|) := fun t ↦
        (intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt_right (hc.intervalIntegrable 0 t) hc.continuousAt).differentiableAt
      exact hd.continuous.intervalIntegrable _ _
    · intro t ht; rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      intro t
      apply intervalIntegral.differentiableAt_integral_of_continuous_right
      exact g''_cont.abs.continuousAt
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      intro t
      apply HasDerivAt.differentiableAt
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt_right
      · exact g''_cont.abs.intervalIntegrable _ _
      · exact g''_cont.abs.continuousAt
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le zero_le_one] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs.intervalIntegrable _ _
    · have h_cont : Continuous (fun s => |g'' s|) := g''_cont.abs
      have h_diff : Differentiable ℝ (fun t => ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|) :=
        fun t => (intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt h_cont.continuousAt (h_cont.intervalIntegrable _ _)).differentiableAt
      exact h_diff.continuous.intervalIntegrable _ _
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact MeasureTheory.LocallyIntegrable.continuous_primitive g''_cont.abs.locallyIntegrable 0
    · intro t ht
      apply abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply IntervalIntegrable.continuousOn_primitive_interval
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact g''_cont.abs
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.abs
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegral g''_cont 0
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegral (Continuous.abs g''_cont) 0
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]; fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive g''_cont.abs
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_integral_interval
      exact g''_cont.abs
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      apply intervalIntegral.differentiable_integral_of_continuous
      fun_prop
    · intro t ht
      apply abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · have := (Continuous.abs g''_cont).locallyIntegrable
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply MeasureTheory.continuous_integral_interval_left
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs (Set.mem_uIcc_of_le (by norm_num) ht).1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact (g''_cont.abs).integral_interval 0
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · have : Continuous (fun t ↦ ∫ s in 0..t, |g'' s|) := by
        apply Differentiable.continuous
        intro t
        apply intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt_right g''_cont.abs.continuousAt
        exact g''_cont.abs.intervalIntegrable 0 t
      exact this.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · intro t ht
      rw [uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_on_primitive_interval
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · intros t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
    · exact (intervalIntegral.differentiable_integral_of_continuous g''_cont.abs 0).continuous.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · intro t ht
      rw [uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      apply intervalIntegral.differentiable_integral_of_continuous g''_cont.abs 0
    · intro t ht
      apply abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1.le

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · exact (intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive g''_cont.locallyIntegrable 0).abs.intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · exact (intervalIntegral.continuous_primitive g''_cont.abs.locallyIntegrable 0).intervalIntegrable 0 1
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · intro t ht; exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs.intervalIntegrable _ _
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact continuous_integral_interval g''_cont.abs 0

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on zero_le_one
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact (g''_cont.intervalIntegral continuous_const continuous_id).abs
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact g''_cont.abs.intervalIntegral continuous_const continuous_id
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      intro t
      apply HasDerivAt.differentiableAt
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt_right
      · apply Continuous.continuousAt; fun_prop
      · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable; fun_prop
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.integral_interval g''_cont.abs.locallyIntegrable 0
    · intros t ht
      rw [uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegral g''_cont.abs continuous_const continuous_id
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop) 0 1
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_integral_interval_left
      exact Continuous.locallyIntegrable (by fun_prop)
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      intro t
      apply HasDerivAt.differentiableAt
      apply intervalIntegral.integral_hasDerivAt_right
      · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
        exact Continuous.abs g''_cont
      · apply ContinuousAt.stronglyMeasurableAtFilter
        exact (Continuous.abs g''_cont).continuousAt
      · exact (Continuous.abs g''_cont).continuousAt
    · rintro t ⟨ht, -⟩
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_on_primitive_interval
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.abs g''_cont
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · simp only [int_g''_eq_sub]
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact (g'_cont.sub continuous_const).abs
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      exact Continuous.integral_interval g''_cont.abs 0
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.abs
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegral g''_cont continuous_const continuous_id
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.intervalIntegral (Continuous.abs g''_cont) continuous_const continuous_id
    · intro t ht
      rw [Set.uIcc_of_le (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1)] at ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono (by norm_num)
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply ContinuousOn.abs
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_on_primitive_interval
      apply Continuous.continuousOn
      fun_prop
    · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
      apply intervalIntegral.continuous_on_primitive_interval
      apply Continuous.continuousOn
      fun_prop
    · intros t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1

apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono zero_le_one
    · simp_rw [int_g''_eq_sub]
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Differentiable.continuous
      apply intervalIntegral.differentiable_integral_of_continuous g''_cont.abs
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1
successful_attempts:
apply intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by norm_num)
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      apply Continuous.abs
      fun_prop
    · apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
      fun_prop
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht.1
